roadmapCategories.name: Foundations
roadmapCategories.description: Master the core language primitives that power every modern JavaScript and TypeScript application

roadmapCategories.name: React
roadmapCategories.description: Build a rock-solid understanding of React fundamentals, then level up with architecture and design patterns used in production apps

roadmapCategories.name: Data Fetching
roadmapCategories.description: Learn to manage asynchronous data like a pro, from querying remote APIs to caching and synchronising complex state

roadmapCategories.name: State Management
roadmapCategories.description: Control app state with confidence by exploring both enterprise-grade and lightweight approaches to managing data flows

roadmapCategories.name: Navigation
roadmapCategories.description: Deliver seamless user journeys by understanding routing strategies across traditional and cutting-edge navigation stacks

roadmapCategories.name: Forms
roadmapCategories.description: Build resilient forms with validation, error handling, and seamless user input experiences

roadmapCategories.name: Styling
roadmapCategories.description: Style modern applications with utility-first CSS and build beautiful user interfaces

roadmapCategories.name: Frameworks
roadmapCategories.description: Adopt the frameworks that ship modern React apps-from server-side rendering to full-stack meta frameworks
